title: Pig to capybara
description: This texture pack turns a pig into a capybara.
body:
# Pig To Capybara Resource Pack for Minecraft

Transform your Minecraft world with the great Capybara Pigs Resource Pack! This pack replaces the normal pigs with the vanilla-like capybaras, without the use of any mods!(except optifine).

## Features:

**Adorable Capybaras:** Every pig model is replaced with capybara models!

**Immersive Gameplay:** Explore Minecraft's landscapes with capybaras roaming naturally through forests, paddling in rivers, and grazing across plains.

## Why Download?

The Capybara Pig Resource Pack enriches your Minecraft journey with capybaras:

**Capybaras:** Turns pigs into capybaras using optifine this pack makes it so you can have capybaras replace the old boring pigs in Minecraft.

**Optifine:** Sadly this resource pack does require optifine/optifabric. I am planning to make it not require optifine in the future but for now you will have to use it as is until then. You can find optifine on optifine.net!

Download the Capybara Pig Resource Pack today and take a playful Minecraft journey where capybaras replace pigs!
